attributes.description: Single deployment deep dive with replica availability, pod resource usage, container restart trends, and network I/O.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.deployment.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.deployment.name
| LIMIT 1

embeddableConfig.description: Click to view deployment logs (opens a new tab)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.deployment.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS available = MAX(k8s.deployment.available)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.deployment.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS available = MAX(k8s.deployment.available)

embeddableConfig.description: Available replicas for this deployment. MAX(k8s.deployment.available).

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.deployment.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS desired = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.deployment.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS desired = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired)

embeddableConfig.description: Desired replicas for this deployment. MAX(k8s.deployment.desired).

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)

embeddableConfig.description: Pod count for this deployment. COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid).

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts) BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts) BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)

embeddableConfig.description: Total container restarts. MAX(k8s.container.restarts) per pod+container, then SUM.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.deployment.name), names = VALUES(k8s.deployment.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " deployments"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.deployment.name), names = VALUES(k8s.deployment.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " deployments"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, max_val

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, max_val

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = AVG(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, max_val

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = AVG(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, max_val

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `CPU usage`

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `CPU usage`

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Memory working set` = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Memory working set`

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Memory working set` = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Memory working set`

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS avail_per = MAX(k8s.volume.available),
        cap_per = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| STATS avail = SUM(avail_per), cap = SUM(cap_per)
| EVAL utilization = 1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(avail) / TO_DOUBLE(cap), max_val = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, max_val

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS avail_per = MAX(k8s.volume.available),
        cap_per = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| STATS avail = SUM(avail_per), cap = SUM(cap_per)
| EVAL utilization = 1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(avail) / TO_DOUBLE(cap), max_val = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, max_val

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS avail_per = AVG(k8s.volume.available),
        cap_per = AVG(k8s.volume.capacity)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| STATS available = SUM(avail_per),
        capacity = SUM(cap_per)
    BY timestamp
| EVAL `Volume usage` = capacity - available
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Volume usage`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS avail_per = AVG(k8s.volume.available),
        cap_per = AVG(k8s.volume.capacity)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| STATS available = SUM(avail_per),
        capacity = SUM(cap_per)
    BY timestamp
| EVAL `Volume usage` = capacity - available
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Volume usage`

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS limit_per = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_limit = SUM(limit_per)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_limit, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS limit_per = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_limit = SUM(limit_per)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_limit, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.memory_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS limit_per = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_limit = SUM(limit_per)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_limit, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.memory_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS limit_per = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_limit = SUM(limit_per)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_limit, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS cap_per = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| STATS total_cap = SUM(cap_per)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_cap, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS cap_per = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| STATS total_cap = SUM(cap_per)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_cap, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Pod count` = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Pod count`

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Pod count` = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Pod count`

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL OR k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    available = SUM(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired = SUM(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, desired, available

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL OR k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    available = SUM(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired = SUM(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, desired, available

embeddableConfig.description: Available vs desired replicas over time. SUM per 1m bucket.

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    `Throughput` = SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, direction, `Throughput`

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    `Throughput` = SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, direction, `Throughput`

embeddableConfig.description: Network I/O over time by direction (transmit/receive). SUM(RATE(k8s.node.network.io)) per 1m bucket.
embeddableConfig.title: Network I/O

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU limit utilization` = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization)
    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.pod.name
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.pod.name, `CPU limit utilization`

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU limit utilization` = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization)
    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.pod.name
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.pod.name, `CPU limit utilization`

embeddableConfig.description: CPU limit utilization per pod. avg(k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization).
embeddableConfig.title: CPU limit utilization by pod

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Memory limit utilization` = AVG(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization)
    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.pod.name
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.pod.name, `Memory limit utilization`

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Memory limit utilization` = AVG(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization)
    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.pod.name
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.pod.name, `Memory limit utilization`

embeddableConfig.description: Memory limit utilization per pod. avg(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization).
embeddableConfig.title: Memory limit utilization by pod

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Restarts` = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.pod.name
| WHERE `Restarts` > 0
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.pod.name, `Restarts`

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Restarts` = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.pod.name
| WHERE `Restarts` > 0
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.pod.name, `Restarts`

embeddableConfig.description: Container restarts over time per pod. max(k8s.container.restarts) broken down by k8s.pod.name.
embeddableConfig.title: Container restarts by pod

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS phase_latest = MAX(CASE(k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL))
    BY k8s.pod.name
| EVAL phase_val = CASE(@timestamp == phase_latest, k8s.pod.phase, NULL)
| STATS
    phase_num      = MAX(phase_val),
    cpu_usage      = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    memory_ws      = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    mem_limit_util = AVG(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization),
    restarts       = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    k8s.node.name  = MAX(k8s.node.name)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| EVAL
    phase = CASE(
      phase_num == 1, "Pending",
      phase_num == 2, "Running",
      phase_num == 3, "Succeeded",
      phase_num == 4, "Failed",
      "Unknown"),
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0)
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, phase, cpu_usage, memory_ws, mem_limit_util, restarts, k8s.node.name
| SORT restarts DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS phase_latest = MAX(CASE(k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL))
    BY k8s.pod.name
| EVAL phase_val = CASE(@timestamp == phase_latest, k8s.pod.phase, NULL)
| STATS
    phase_num      = MAX(phase_val),
    cpu_usage      = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    memory_ws      = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    mem_limit_util = AVG(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization),
    restarts       = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    k8s.node.name  = MAX(k8s.node.name)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| EVAL
    phase = CASE(
      phase_num == 1, "Pending",
      phase_num == 2, "Running",
      phase_num == 3, "Succeeded",
      phase_num == 4, "Failed",
      "Unknown"),
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0)
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, phase, cpu_usage, memory_ws, mem_limit_util, restarts, k8s.node.name
| SORT restarts DESC
| LIMIT 100

embeddableConfig.description: Pods in this deployment with phase, CPU, memory, restarts, and memory limit utilization. Drills down to Pod Detail.
embeddableConfig.title: Pods

attributes.title: [OTEL][Kubernetes] Deployment Detail
